description: 10-prompt live generation smoke subset — requires provider keys, credits, and auth

prompts.text: Build a landing page for a meditation app with calm gradients and email signup
Build a SaaS analytics dashboard with revenue charts and team settings
Build me a CRM for dentists with scheduling and patient notes
Build a salon booking app with stylist calendar and reminders
Build a personal finance dashboard with budgets and transaction categories
Build an AI writing assistant with prompt history and streaming responses
Build a community forum app with posts, comments, and user profiles
Build an admin panel with user management, roles, and audit log table
Build a mobile-first habit tracker with streaks and daily check-in
Build a mini e-commerce storefront with product grid and cart
